title: Normalize Controls without Erasing Their Contract
summary: Build and verify css form inheritance in cross-browser survey control typography audit through prediction, inspection, explanation, cumulative code, and changed-case transfer.
objectives: Explain css form inheritance from purpose, behavior, and evidence.
Apply css form inheritance without discarding earlier valid work.
Diagnose the named misconception in changed content, input, and failure states.

steps.title: 04 · Read the cross-browser survey control typography audit case · theory
steps.instruction: Checkpoint 4: Which claim preserves css form inheritance when data, input, and layout change? Scenario: cross-browser survey control typography audit.
steps.why: Normalize Controls without Erasing Their Contract makes the decision observable and testable. This is checkpoint 4 in cross-browser survey control typography audit.

content.text: Form controls do not inherit every typography and color property consistently across browsers. A bounded normalization can apply font, color, line height, and box sizing while preserving recognizable native affordances, platform states, and high-contrast behavior. Global appearance removal creates a full custom-control obligation. Apply it to cross-browser survey control typography audit.
